LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, MARCH-24-2020 HEARING RE MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE COMPLAINT-IN-INTERVENTION, OFF CALENDAR. IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS IN DEPARTMENT 302 FILED BEFORE JUNE 1, 2020 ARE OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S GENERAL ORDERS. TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. (302/EPS)

NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)
ORDER RE: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION (GRANTED) (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF IN INTERVENTION CHURCH MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE COMPLAINT-IN-INTERVENTION IS GRANTED. ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF ASSERTS THAT THE CASE HAS SETTLED, IT REMAINS PENDING AND CHURCH HAS AN UNCONDITIONAL STATUTORY RIGHT TO INTERVENE IN THE ACTION AT ANY TIME BEFORE TRIAL. (LAB. CODE SEC 3853; CODE CIV. PROC. SEC 387(D); MAR V. SAKTI INTERNATIONAL CORP. (1992) 9 CAL.APP.4TH 1780.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Complaint-In-Intervention
Off Calendar Jul-21-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff in Intervention Church Mutual Insurance Company's motion for leave to file complaint-in-intervention is granted. Although Plaintiff asserts that the case has settled, it remains pending and Church has an unconditional statutory right to intervene in the action at any time before trial. (Lab. Code 3853; Code Civ. Proc. 387(d); Mar v. Sakti International Corp. (1992) 9 Cal.App.4th 1780.)

order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
